title: Wano / Onigashima War — Chapter 1027
main_description: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders. This chapter contains 4 structured story parts and 132 cleaned dialogue lines.
